data.title: Tron’s Justin Sun announces TRX CA on Solana blockchain
data.description:
Tron has been having a great day. Its founder Justin Sun took to X, formerly Twitter, with an update to a tweet he shared days before; “TRX on SOL is now live!” He wrote before adding that “All liquidity is ready!” and sharing the Contract Address (CA) which is GbbesPbaYh5uiAZSYNXTc7w9jty1rpg3P9L4JeN4LkKc.  In subsequent tweets, Sun was […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tron-justin-sun-trx-ca-on-solana/

data.title: Bitcoin volatility hits 3.6% amid heightened market uncertainty
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) volatility climbed to 3.6% on March 19 — the highest point since August 2024,  according to data from CoinGlass. 
The volatility reflects heightened market uncertainty amid structural unknowns in the US economy, according to Uldis Tearudklans, chief revenue officer at UK-based cryptocurrency exchange Paybis.
“The policy landscape is becoming more complex with the emergence of Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency,” Tearudklans said
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-volatility-hits-3-6-heightened-market-uncertainty?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.description:

data.title: Uniswap Foundation Gets $177 Million in Funding as Ethereum DeFi Users Await Fee Sharing
data.description:
More than 80% of governance participants voted in favor of two new proposals that will fund the Uniswap Foundation's initiatives.
source: https://decrypt.co/310912/uniswap-177-million-funding-fee-sharing

data.title: ATAI Life Sciences Adopts Bitcoin Financial Strategy with Initial Investment
data.description: According to BlockBeats, ATAI Life Sciences, a biopharmaceutical company, has announced its decision to implement a Bitcoin financial strategy by initially investing $5 million in the cryptocurrency. This announcement led to a temporary increase in ATAI's stock price. The company's chairman, Christian Angermayer, stated that while the initial investment in Bitcoin is set at $5 million, ATAI will maintain sufficient cash reserves, short-term securities, and public equity to ensure operational funding through 2027.

data.title: Staking for ether ETFs gathers steam as BlackRock talks up potential, NYSE files on behalf of Bitwise fund
data.description:
Spot Ethereum ETFs, launched without staking, have attracted significantly less investment than spot Bitcoin ETFs.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/347372/staking-for-ether-etfs-gathers-steam-as-blackrock-talks-up-potential-nyse-files-on-behalf-of-bitwise-fund?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: SEC’s Notation of Cardano’s Utility Boosts Social Sentiments While ADA Daily Gains Skyrocket
data.description:
Cardano (ADA) has recorded a spike in positive social sentiments this week, courtesy of the recent notations made by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commissions.
source: https://zycrypto.com/secs-notation-of-cardanos-utility-boosts-social-sentiments-while-ada-daily-gains-skyrocket/

data.title: VanEck CEO Predicts Biggest Milestone for Crypto in 2025 – Here’s His Outlook
data.description:
VanEck chief executive Jan van Eck is outlining what he thinks will be the biggest milestone for the crypto sector in 2025. While speaking with Anthony Pompliano at Bitcoin Investor Week, Van Eck argues that stablecoins are the most interesting part of the digital asset world..
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/20/vaneck-ceo-predicts-biggest-milestone-for-crypto-in-2025-heres-his-outlook/

data.title: Runes Protocol unveils ‘agents’ to enhance Bitcoin DeFi with native AMM capabilities
data.description:
The Runes Protocol, a Bitcoin-based fungible token standard, has unveiled a major upgrade introducing “agents” to enable Automated Market Makers (AMMs) directly on Bitcoin’s (BTC) Layer 1. This development aims to enhance decentralized trading capabilities while maintaining Bitcoin’s security and trustless nature. Casey Rodarmor, the creator of Runes, announced the upgrade on March 20.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/runes-protocol-unveils-agents-to-enhance-bitcoin-defi-with-native-amm-capabilities/

data.title: $10 XRP Price Closer Than Ever As Ripple Emerges Victorious in SEC Lawsuit
data.description:
Ripple has successfully walked away victorious after fighting a 4-year long legal battle with the U.S Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC).
source: https://zycrypto.com/10-xrp-price-closer-than-ever-as-ripple-emerges-victorious-in-sec-lawsuit/
